description: Brand-new customer attempts to purchase a premium gaming laptop at 2 AM.
notes: Large online purchase by a new customer during late-night hours is a strong fraud indicator.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: A newly issued card is used for an expensive luxury watch purchase at 1 AM.
notes: High-value online shopping combined with a new profile and odd hours strongly suggests fraud.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: Tiny online purchase used to verify whether stolen card credentials are active.
notes: Very small nighttime transaction by a new customer resembles classic card testing.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: Low-value grocery transaction performed shortly after midnight.
notes: Small authorization transactions are frequently used before larger fraudulent purchases.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: Senior customer suddenly purchases expensive jewellery online.
notes: Purchase is inconsistent with the senior customer's usual spending behaviour.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: Established customer suddenly spends fifty times their average transaction value.
notes: Transaction amount is dramatically higher than established spending history.
label: fraud
claude_audit_notes: Payload consistent with typology and expected_label. No override needed.

description: A brand-new customer attempts to purchase professional photography equipment during early morning hours.
notes: Large online purchase during late-night hours by a customer with no history strongly indicates fraudulent behaviour.
label: fraud

description: A newly created customer profile books an international luxury resort at 12:40 AM.
notes: High-value travel bookings at midnight from new customers are a common fraud pattern.
label: fraud

description: A very small payment is attempted to validate stolen card credentials.
